jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Granules India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Granules India in Bhopal offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Granules India:
Granules India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Granules India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
